response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified 'BANG!!!' by EGOIST at 00:00. Search string: '"BANG!!!" EGOIST Japanese and English lyrics'. Found romanized lyrics and English translation. 2. Identified 'Life is GAME' by Hakos Baelz at 01:36 (appears to be a Hololive original). Search string: '"Life is GAME" Hakos Baelz Japanese and English lyrics'. Lyrics are an original work. 3. Identified 'Bad Apple!!' at 02:40 with text "作曲:ZUN". Search string: '"Bad Apple!!" ZUN Japanese and English lyrics'. Found well-documented lyrics for this classic Touhou song.
response.global_summary: A 3-song medley featuring virtual idols (including Hakos Baelz) performing 'BANG!!!', 'Life is GAME', and 'Bad Apple!!'. The performances are interspersed with stylized transitions.

scenes.description: A group of virtual idols performs the song 'BANG!!!', which appears in text on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
好き 嫌い 常識 I don't care 吹っ飛べ BANG!!!
フル10鳴らす このリリック かます
わからす 挑発 下向いて舌打ちからの ｢は?｣ (Excuse me)
あしからず 倍返し 食らえ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Like it, hate it, common sense, I don't care - blow it up with a BANG!!!
Full 10 rings. Strike a blow with this.
Unintentionally pick a fight. Looking down and clicking your tongue with "Huh?"
Excuse me, I'm not sorry. Double it, take it.

scenes.description: An instrumental transition interlude with dice and money graphics.
Solo performance of 'Life is GAME' by Hakos Baelz on a game board.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: (Lyrics not fully publicly verified, assumed original work)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: (Lyrics not fully publicly verified, assumed original work)

scenes.description: A short transition featuring the logo for 'Bad Apple!!'.
Solo performance of 'Bad Apple!!' by Hakos Baelz.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
流れてく時の中ででも倦怠さがほらグルグル回って
私から離れる心も見えないわそうしらない
自分から動くこともなく時の隙間に流され続けて
知らないわ周りのことなど私は私それだけ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Even in the midst of flowing time, I feel languid, look, spinning around and around
About you, about me, about everything—I still don't know a thing
If my emotional eyelids were to open, then I'd break everything
Let it all turn to black!!!
